use_cases: Displaying image galleries with clickable previews in web applications
Grid-based product preview collection for e-commerce interfaces
Code snippet and documentation previews in developer tools
Media asset browser with responsive grid layout
ai_summary: A responsive preview grid component that displays items (images, code, text, video) in a 2-4 column grid layout depending on viewport. Features hover scale effects on images, keyboard navigation support (space to open), and accessibility-focused focus rings. Designed as a gallery/browsing interface for media, products, or content previews.
